description: Complete system overview detailing the healthcare compliance platform architecture, key components, and their interactions
Detailed documentation of the HIPAA compliance assessment engine, including scoring algorithms, regulatory mapping, and recommendation generation logic
Comprehensive documentation of data models for HIPAA compliance assessments, system dependencies, business impact analysis, and health monitoring systems
Documentation of healthcare system dependency mapping, criticality assessment algorithms, and risk level calculations for interconnected medical systems
Detailed documentation of healthcare-specific impact assessment methodologies, patient care impact scoring, and recovery time objective calculations
